title: children
description: Resolves children passed to a component into a reactive accessor. Handles lazy children and arrays.
param_fn_desc: Accessor that returns the children prop.
returns_desc: A <0>ChildrenReturn</0>, a callable accessor that returns the resolved children. Also has a <1>toArray()</1> method that returns the resolved children as a flat array.
usage_provider: The site publisher's <0>AwsProvider</0> wraps its subtree in <1>children(() => props.children)</1> and renders <2>resolved()</2> inside the context provider, so the S3 client is resolved and torn down alongside the tree it serves.
in_the_wild: See this provider wire up the whole deployment tree in the <0>site-publisher walkthrough</0>.
